FFlagFixGrassSurfaceLightShading_Staged.purpose: Enhances visual quality by making grass look more realistic and appealing.

FFlagEnableRefactorGoogleAdViewControlsF.mechanism: Modifies how ad view controls fade in and out during gameplay.
FFlagEnableRefactorGoogleAdViewControlsF.purpose: Creates a smoother and less intrusive ad experience for players.

FFlagRenderParticlesSimulateNonVisible7_.mechanism: Improves how particles are rendered even when objects are not visible.
FFlagRenderParticlesSimulateNonVisible7_.purpose: Enhances visual effects in the game, making them look better and more realistic.

FFlagStopBubbleChatReactWarning.mechanism: Disables warnings related to bubble chat reactions.
FFlagStopBubbleChatReactWarning.purpose: Reduces interruptions for players, allowing for a smoother chatting experience.

FFlagEnableAdCtaUseNewTouchListener.mechanism: Introduces a new method for detecting touch interactions with ads.
FFlagEnableAdCtaUseNewTouchListener.purpose: Improves the responsiveness of ad interactions, making it easier for players to engage with ads.

DFFlagVoiceChatRoomCreationOnFirstUserJo.mechanism: Allows a voice chat room to be created when the first player joins.
DFFlagVoiceChatRoomCreationOnFirstUserJo.purpose: Enables immediate voice communication for players as soon as they enter a game.

DFIntHttpServiceEventReportThrottleHundr.mechanism: Limits the frequency of event reports sent via HTTP to reduce server load.
DFIntHttpServiceEventReportThrottleHundr.purpose: Improves game performance by managing server resources more efficiently.

DFFlagClientProcessLimitPartial_PlaceFil.mechanism: Limits the number of processes a client can run, applying a filter to specific places.
DFFlagClientProcessLimitPartial_PlaceFil.purpose: Improves game performance by reducing resource usage in certain areas.

FFlagBootcampCLI165710_Staged.mechanism: Introduces a new command-line interface for bootcamp features in a staged rollout.
FFlagBootcampCLI165710_Staged.purpose: Enhances the onboarding experience for new players by providing better guidance and tools.

FFlagDelayAudioFocusReplication_Staged.mechanism: Delays the replication of audio focus changes to improve synchronization.
FFlagDelayAudioFocusReplication_Staged.purpose: Ensures a smoother audio experience for players by reducing lag in sound effects.
